overview: Expert in taxation, auditing, financial management, and business advisory services.

roadmap.title: Stream Selection & Foundation
key_actions: Develop strong accounting fundamentals and logical reasoning skills.

roadmap.title: Entry-level Preparation
roadmap.description: Introduction to basic accounting, law, and business management.

roadmap.title: In-depth Knowledge
roadmap.description: Study accounting, taxation, audit, law, and financial management.

roadmap.title: Practical Training
roadmap.description: Mandatory practical exposure under a practicing CA firm.
key_actions: Work on audits, GST, income tax, financial reporting.

roadmap.title: Become a Chartered Accountant
roadmap.description: Clear CA Final exams conducted by ICAI.
key_actions: Apply for membership in ICAI to practice independently.
